questions.question_text:
You are participating in a behavioral economics experiment.

Look at the decision table shown below:
{{ decision_screen }}

In this table, each row is a different version of a choice between Set A (red) and Set B (blue). You must decide, for each row, whether you prefer Set A or Set B.

You can only switch from Set A to Set B at one point in the table (or choose the same set for all rows).

At which row (version number) would you switch from choosing Set A to choosing Set B?
Enter 0 if you would choose Set A in every row.
Enter 26 if you would choose Set B in every row.
Otherwise enter the version number (1-25) where you switch to Set B.
